calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Cantor for and with Jasper Zhao.

Mr. Cantor stated that they have no other documents, and that all they have is the voter's registration, the immunization records and the declarations. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
